events.title: Her Private Hell (2026)
events.description: Revenge wears leather. When a mysterious mist engulfs a futuristic metropolis, unleashing a deadly elusive entity, a troubled young woman searches for her father. Her quest collides with an American GI on a harrowing odyssey to rescue his daughter from Hell.

events.title: Avatar Aang: The Last Airbender (2026)
events.description: The legacy reawakens. Avatar Aang, the world's last Airbender, learns of an ancient power that could save his culture from extinction. With his friends, he embarks on a global quest to find it before it falls into the wrong hands.
